source.goal: Reusable 30-chat simulation corpus for API and browser Falcon regression testing.

turns: Create a dataset called Falcon QA Smoke with columns question, expected_answer, source.
Add 5 rows about customer support conversations and show me the row count.
Rename expected_answer to ideal_answer and add a metadata column named priority.
Show me the dataset schema and summarize anything missing.
Generate a dataset of 10 customer support conversa
Make the rows more realistic with escalation and refund examples.
Can you list all the datasets and confirm the new dataset exists?
Create a small eval-ready split from that dataset.
create a dataset with 3 columns named name phonenu
I meant phone_number, email, and notes. Fix the schema.
Add two sample contacts and then show only names and phone numbers.
Tell me exactly what you changed.
Create an evaluation for intent detection and add it to my latest support dataset.
Use labels refund, cancellation, technical_issue, and billing_question.
Run it on a small sample and show failing examples.
Suggest how to improve the evaluator instructions.
I want to make a composite eval and for the pasted response check correctness and tone.
Add groundedness as a third criterion with higher weight.
Test it on this output: old macdonald had a farm.
Explain whether the eval should be code, LLM, or agent based.
how to build a voice eval
Now create a voice-call quality eval template for interruption handling and compliance.
Apply it to the latest voice call dataset if one exists.
If no dataset exists, tell me exactly what data you need.
why can't i see a project here?
Check my current workspace and list projects I can access.
Search recent traces for the visible projects.
Tell me if this is a permission issue or a data availability issue.
In my smart ATS project I want to apply OCR eval d
Find the Smart ATS project and recent traces that have OCR-like outputs.
Create or select an OCR accuracy eval for those outputs.
Run a small validation and summarize the top failure modes.
In feed section which shows issues or what can be
Summarise all the suggestions in the feed to improve the project.
Group the issues by severity and owning feature.
Turn the highest severity issue into an action plan.
i need to see ai_outcome. its digged very a lot in
Search recent traces and find where ai_outcome appears in nested input, output, metadata, or span attributes.
Create a view that exposes ai_outcome next to trace id and status.
Show example rows and explain the field path.
cany ou create a new prompt template?
Make it for customer support triage with variables customer_message and account_tier.
Create a second version that is stricter about escalation.
Compare the versions and recommend which one to use.
Add the variables from remaining to here
Find the current prompt context and identify missing variables.
Wire the variables into the prompt body without changing the intent.
Run a dry test with sample values.
/fix-with-falcon Fix this failing evaluation. Con
Find the failing eval result and inspect the related dataset row and trace.
Diagnose whether the failure is prompt, eval config, or data quality.
Make the smallest safe fix and show before versus after.
/fix-with-falcon This voice call has issues. Analy
Find interruptions, silence, compliance misses, and incorrect next action.
Map each issue to the call trace spans and eval results.
Suggest agent prompt and eval changes.
build an agent for me which qualifies sales lead
Add qualification criteria: budget, authority, need, timeline, and company size.
Create three simulator personas: high intent, budget constrained, and unqualified.
Run a small simulation and summarize what the sales agent should improve.
fix my agent based on errors and evals
Find recent failed simulations and related traces.
Identify which evals failed and the exact conversation turns responsible.
Patch the agent instructions and propose a regression simulation.
Provide me with a view of date of calls on x axis,
Use call count on y axis, grouped by status and project.
Add a filter for the last 14 days.
Render or create the dashboard widget and explain the query.
how do I export all the annotation results
Find annotation queues in my workspace.
For the most recent queue, summarize status counts and labels.
Tell me the API or UI path to export the results.
Create an custom eval for with name "CTA Action Ty
Complete the name as CTA Action Type and define allowed outputs: schedule_demo, send_docs, follow_up, no_action.
Test the eval on three sample assistant replies.
Add it to a sales dataset if available.
New RAG pipeline for legal review. No evals. Build
Create a minimal eval suite for citation accuracy, answer groundedness, and refusal safety.
Generate a small synthetic legal-review dataset.
Run the eval suite and tell me what is production blocking.
Search docs for setting up tracing in Python.
Based on those docs, create a checklist for my workspace instrumentation.
Find recent traces that look incorrectly instrumented.
Turn the checklist into action items.
can you tell me how good andaman islands is
Use web search, then summarize travel timing, common risks, and whether it is suitable for a short family trip.
Separate current facts from general advice.
Cite the sources you used.
List my MCP connectors and show enabled tools.
Disable one risky write tool on a connector while keeping read tools enabled.
Re-enable it and confirm the enabled tool list changed correctly.
Explain which tools Falcon can now use.
Describe this image
Extract any text or UI labels from it.
If it looks like a product screenshot, suggest the most likely Falcon context page.
Create a follow-up test prompt for this file.
Audit my workspace health across projects, usage, traces, eval failures, and expensive models.
Find top 5 cost drivers and top 5 reliability issues.
Create a prioritized action list.
Do not make destructive changes; only report.
Create a support response prompt and evaluate it against a small dataset.
Create two variants: concise and empathetic.
Run an experiment comparing the variants with helpfulness and correctness evals.
Recommend the winning variant with evidence.
Find recent error traces and turn representative examples into an eval dataset.
Create columns input, output, error_type, expected_behavior.
Create an eval that checks whether the model avoids those errors.
Run it and summarize the failing examples.
Create an agent testing suite for a refund support agent.
Add edge cases: angry customer, policy exception, missing order id, and fraud suspicion.
Run simulations, inspect traces, and evaluate policy compliance.
Return a ranked list of prompt fixes.
Find failing traces for my most active project and localize the root cause.
Trigger error localization on the worst trace.
Poll until the result is ready.
Summarize the root cause and proposed fix.
Build a small end-to-end QA pipeline: dataset, prompt, evals, experiment, and dashboard.
Use a customer support domain and include at least 5 test rows.
Run the prompt over the dataset and evaluate correctness, tone, and escalation behavior.
Create a dashboard or widget summarizing pass rate and failure reasons.
Give me a production-readiness summary with blockers.
